title: Session::chat_capability Ok(None) conflates account-absent and capability-absent
description: jmap.rs: Session::chat_capability returns Ok(None) both when account_id is not in session.accounts AND when the account exists but lacks the chat capability key. The doc comment only describes the second case. A caller cannot distinguish the two without calling session.accounts.contains_key separately. Either document the conflation explicitly in the doc comment, or split into two distinct return paths. Same issue applies to chat_push_capability.
